text.title: RACI Matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Accountable equals Responsible for the senior role on every task.
antipattern.root-cause: LLMs assign A=R to the project lead because charters say 'PM owns delivery'.
antipattern.fix: Separate A from R where the Accountable should not be doing the work; flag A=R rows for review.

antipattern.symptom: Consulted on every named role 'to be thorough'.
antipattern.root-cause: A matrix with 8 Consulted per task is a meeting schedule, not a responsibility model.
antipattern.fix: Force C cap 4 in prompt; reduce surplus to I.

antipattern.symptom: RACI stored only in Confluence / wiki with no version history.
antipattern.root-cause: Role changes are invisible without diffs.
antipattern.fix: Source control as CSV; generate Markdown for Confluence view.

antipattern.symptom: Agent silently fixes violations by reassigning roles without human review.
antipattern.root-cause: Every role change has organisational implications.
antipattern.fix: Violations surface to the human Accountable; agent flags, never resolves.
